metadata.title: FormHandler — Never Miss Another Overseas Inquiry
metadata.description: A structured inquiry system designed for B2B export websites. Inquiries pushed to your Telegram within 5 seconds. No server needed — live in 5 minutes.

hero.headline: Never Miss Another Overseas Inquiry
hero.subheadline:
A structured inquiry system designed for B2B export websites.
Inquiries pushed to your Telegram within 5 seconds.
hero.tagline: No server · No email config · Live in 5 minutes

painPoints.title: Is Your Website Actually Helping You Win Orders?
painPoints.intro: Most export websites have a "Contact Us" page, but the real problems are:
items: Sales sees emails hours too late
Form fields too basic — incomplete buyer info
Too much spam, no way to filter
High IT cost, painful to maintain
No idea which product page brought the buyer
painPoints.conclusion: By the time you see the inquiry, the buyer has already contacted your competitor.

solution.title: An Inquiry System Built for Export Businesses
solution.subtitle: We're not a generic form tool. We're purpose-built for export company websites.

features.title: Structured Inquiry Fields
features.summary: Sales gets complete info upfront — not just "Hi, send me price."

features.title: Built-in Visitor Analytics
items: See if anyone is visiting your site in real time
Identify which countries your visitors come from
Find out which product pages get the most attention
features.summary: Know your audience without installing any third-party analytics.

features.title: Real-time Telegram Push
items: Pushed to your Telegram in 5 seconds
features.summary: No waiting for email refresh. Never miss the golden 10 minutes.

features.title: Embedded Floating Button
features.description: Appears automatically at the bottom-right: "Send Inquiry" / "Get Quote"
features.summary: Visitors fill in directly — no page redirect. Significantly higher conversion than traditional contact pages.

features.title: No Backend, No SMTP
features.summary: Copy one snippet of code and go live.

useCases.title: Works for All B2B Websites
bestForItems: Websites that need to launch fast
Businesses that value sales response speed

steps.title: Deploy in 3 Minutes
items: Copy embed code to your website

techSecurity.title: Technology & Security
techSecurity.compatibility: Compatible with static sites, Next.js, WordPress, Shopify, and more.

items.a: Currently in public beta — free to use. Enterprise plans may be offered in the future.
All data is securely stored server-side, with full delete and export support.
Yes — works with Chinese and English websites. Fields are fully customizable.

items.q: Can inquiries be routed to different salespeople?
items.a: Currently supports Telegram group push. More granular routing rules coming soon.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Send us a message — this form is powered by FormHandler.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

finalCta.title: Add a Professional Inquiry Entry to Your Website Today
finalCta.subtitle: Stop letting inquiries sit in your inbox. Let sales get notified instantly.

footer.tagline: Lightweight inquiry infrastructure for export businesses
